content_fingerprint: baseten refreshes inference pricing with free tier new pro and enterprise options baseten has updated its model inference platform with a restructured three tier pricing model basic 0 month pay as you go pro and enterprise adding hipaa compliance priority gpu access and self host deployment options baseten a platform for deploying and running machine learning models in production has refreshed its public pricing with a clearer three tier structure aimed at teams at every scale the entry level basic plan is free to start charging on a pay as you go basis and includes dedicated model deployments
